overall.description: Nighttime gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through downtown Los Santos, passing commercial buildings, traversing a parking garage entrance, and crossing a multi-lane intersection before approaching the Ammu-Nation Gun Club. The scene features urban architecture with mixed historic and modern buildings under clear night skies with artificial street lighting.

storefronts with large illuminated display windows showing merchandise
tall street light casting yellow-orange illumination on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along a commercial sidewalk at night, passing historic buildings with illuminated ground-floor shops. A pedestrian walks ahead in the same direction as the camera moves steadily forward under street lamp lighting.

segments.scene_description: Transitioning into a parking garage entrance area featuring a small attendant booth and chain-link fencing. The space is more enclosed than the open sidewalk, with the parking structure rising ahead.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past commercial buildings and approaching a major intersection

segments.scene_description: Walking along a quieter commercial street section featuring the Wolfs International Realty office and modern concrete buildings. The sidewalk is empty as the camera approaches a distant intersection with traffic signals.

segments.scene_description: Navigating a major urban intersection at night, waiting for a city bus and other vehicles to pass before crossing. The Ammu-Nation Gun Club building becomes increasingly prominent on the right side as the camera crosses the wide street with traffic signals overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with Ammu-Nation Gun Club

segments.scene_description: Arriving at the destination, walking along the sidewalk beside the Ammu-Nation Gun Club with its prominent red neon signage. A pedestrian in a red shirt walks ahead as the camera approaches the building entrance, passing advertising signs and sparse street vegetation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a nighttime urban district that transitions from historic commercial sidewalks to a bustling city intersection. It begins by moving steadily past illuminated ground-floor shops and historic buildings, following a pedestrian under the glow of street lamps. As the camera advances, the open sidewalk narrows into a more enclosed parking garage entrance marked by a small attendant booth and chain-link fencing before opening back up onto a quieter street featuring the modern concrete facade of the Wolfs International Realty office. The scene then expands as the camera reaches a major intersection, pausing for a city bus and other vehicles to pass under overhead traffic signals. Finally, the camera crosses the wide street and approaches the Ammu-Nation Gun Club, moving past advertising signs and sparse vegetation toward the building's prominent red neon signage.
